title: Implications of History for Current Policies and Industrial Structure: The Case of Indian Textile Sector

summary.about: How the history of Indian textiles still shapes present industrial structure, competitiveness and pollution.
summary.audience: Textile policymakers, manufacturers and industrial historians.
summary.method: Synthesizes historical and contemporary studies of the sector.
summary.insights: Small-scale production supported entrepreneurship but constrained competitiveness, while abandoning older low-pollution techniques created environmental costs.
